summary: Black and white montage set to music, with no speech, of American monuments: the Statue of Liberty's crown and torch, a worker climbing the statue, and Mount Rushmore. A condensed-font overlay 'REMEMBER WHO YOU ARE' is held throughout. It closes on an animated white Department of Labor seal.

script.scene: Tight low-angle black and white shot of the Statue of Liberty's spiked crown and face against a pale sky; overlay 'REMEMBER WHO YOU ARE.'
Underside view of the Statue of Liberty's torch-holding hand and arm; same 'REMEMBER WHO YOU ARE' text.
A single worker harnessed and climbing the curved surface of the statue high against a cloudy sky.
Hazy black and white view of a Mount Rushmore presidential face through mist; the overlay text remains.
Cut to black with an animated white U.S. Department of Labor seal ('DEPARTMENT OF LABOR / UNITED STATES OF AMERICA').

notable_text: DEPARTMENT OF LABOR UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
As we celebrate 250 years since our nation's founding...
